name: Spoto Press
coach_notes: Builds control off chest with constant tension.

name: Larsen Press
coach_notes: Reduces leg drive and increases upper-body demand.

name: Pin Press
coach_notes: Dead-stop strength through selected range.

name: Swiss-Bar Bench Press
coach_notes: Neutral grip can reduce shoulder stress.

name: Viking Press
coach_notes: Athletic overhead option with scalable leg drive.

name: Bradford Press
coach_notes: Use light loads and controlled ROM.

name: Bottoms-Up Kettlebell Press
coach_notes: High stability demand with low external load.

name: Deficit Push-Up
avoid_when: Anterior shoulder pain in deep ROM
coach_notes: Adds range of motion without heavy systemic cost.

name: Ring Archer Push-Up
coach_notes: Advanced unilateral pressing progression.

name: Single-Arm Cable Chest Press
coach_notes: Good anti-rotation demand and independent-side loading.

name: Incline Hex Press
coach_notes: Upper-chest emphasis with stable dumbbell path.

name: Dead-Stop Dumbbell Bench Press
coach_notes: Reduces rebound and improves starting strength.

name: Kroc Row
coach_notes: High-load, high-rep row with substantial fatigue.

name: Yates Row
coach_notes: More upright torso and supinated grip.

name: Gorilla Row
coach_notes: Combines rowing with anti-rotation and hinge stability.

name: Batwing Row
coach_notes: Excellent scapular retraction and upper-back control.

name: Kelso Shrug
coach_notes: Trains scapular motion with minimal elbow flexion.

name: High Cable Row
coach_notes: Useful for rear delts and upper-back thickness.

name: Cross-Body Lat Pulldown
coach_notes: Allows individualized lat line of pull.

name: Inverted Barbell Row
coach_notes: Simple scalable bodyweight horizontal pull.

name: Snatch-Grip High Pull
coach_notes: Power-focused pull with high technical demand.

name: Bayesian Cable Curl
coach_notes: High biceps tension in lengthened position.

name: Cheat Curl
coach_notes: Use only with controlled eccentric and experienced lifters.

name: Rope Hammer Curl
coach_notes: Stable resistance and easy fatigue control.

name: Prone Incline Dumbbell Shrug
coach_notes: Supported trap work with low spinal fatigue.

name: Zercher Squat
coach_notes: High trunk demand and upright torso.

name: Hatfield Squat
coach_notes: Hand support allows high loading with reduced balance demand.

name: Cyclist Squat
coach_notes: Strong quad bias with low systemic cost.

name: Spanish Squat
avoid_when: Acute knee pain not tolerating position
coach_notes: Useful quad loading with upright shin and torso.

name: Belt Squat
coach_notes: High leg stimulus with minimal spinal loading.
curated_equipment: Belt squat machine or dip belt setup

name: Jefferson Deadlift
coach_notes: Use cautiously as an asymmetrical hinge.

name: Dimel Deadlift
coach_notes: High-rep hinge emphasizing speed and posterior chain.

name: B-Stance Romanian Deadlift
coach_notes: Adds unilateral bias without full single-leg instability.

name: Reverse Nordic Curl
coach_notes: Lengthened quad loading with low equipment demand.

name: Sissy Squat
avoid_when: poor tolerance to deep knee flexion
coach_notes: Advanced quad isolation; use controlled ROM.

name: Poliquin Step-Up
coach_notes: Controlled knee-over-toe loading.

name: Peterson Step-Up
coach_notes: Small-range quad and knee-control drill.

name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
coach_notes: Unilateral glute work with low axial fatigue.

name: Lateral Sled Drag
coach_notes: Low-eccentric frontal-plane conditioning.

name: Tibialis Raise
coach_notes: Supports ankle capacity and lower-leg balance.

name: Bird Dog
coach_notes: Low-fatigue contralateral stability.

name: Stir-the-Pot
coach_notes: Dynamic anti-extension with shoulder stability.

name: Hollow Body Hold
avoid_when: Low-back pain or loss of contact
coach_notes: Fundamental gymnastics trunk position.

name: Side Plank Reach-Through
coach_notes: Combines lateral trunk stability with controlled rotation.

name: Turkish Sit-Up
coach_notes: First phase of Turkish get-up with trunk and shoulder control.

name: Jefferson Curl
coach_notes: Evidence is limited; use conservatively and progressively.

name: Powell Raise
coach_notes: Targets rear delts with low systemic fatigue.

name: Cuban Rotation
coach_notes: Use light loads and strict control.

name: Wrist Pronation / Supination
coach_notes: Useful for wrist and elbow resilience.

name: Finger Extension Band Opens
coach_notes: Balances high volumes of gripping.

name: Hip Airplane
coach_notes: High-value single-leg hip-control drill.

name: Band-Resisted Side Plank Rotation
coach_notes: Combines trunk stiffness with resisted rotation.
